rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday February 9, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT STERLING BANK AND TRUST, F.S.B., REDWOOD TRUST DEED SERVICES INC. rulings.Case Title: MELI BROWN VS. PEDRO JUAREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 9, 2018, Line 8. DEFENDANT PEDRO JUAREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Nothing on the face of the complaint indicates that Kenneth Sperandio is a "debt collector" within the meaning of FDCPA and Rosethal Act, i.e. that he "is in any business the principal purpose of which is the collection of any debts, or who regularly collects or attempts to collect, directly or indirectly, debts owed or due or asserted to be owed or due another." =(501/REQ)
